description: Model quality issues flagged during pipeline runs. These are NOT engineering/code bugs. They reflect LLM misclassification or enrichment errors to be addressed in a future consolidated prompt improvement pass.

issues.description: Article is about licensing and permits (تراخيص وتصاريح). The model incorrectly assigned the 'fine' concept. No penalty language present in text.
issues.action: log_only — to be addressed in consolidated prompt improvement pass

issues.description: Article is about the center's budget and financial structure (موازنة المركز). The model incorrectly assigned the 'fine' concept. No penalty language present in text.
issues.action: log_only — to be addressed in consolidated prompt improvement pass

audit_notes.EG_PDPL_art_36: Audit script flagged Art 36 as BOTH (penalty + fee) due to the word مقابل appearing in context 'ارتكب ذلك مقابل الحصول على منفعة' (committed in exchange for a benefit) — this is a penalty-aggravation clause, NOT a fee. The 'fine' tag is CORRECT. The audit script keyword مقابل produces a false positive here.
